tool_args.label: ADA Stations Improvements Package 1 at Nine Stations

payload.project_name: Accessibility Stations Improvements Package 1 at Nine Stations
payload.description: Design-Build contract to provide accessibility and various improvements at nine LIRR stations across four LIRR branches: Babylon, Atlantic, Montauk, and Port Washington Branches. Includes 8 new elevators, 2 elevator replacements, escalator replacement at Valley Stream, pedestrian tunnel reconstruction, platform replacement, and site improvements.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ADA Stations – 9 Stations Design-Build, Package 1
Original Forecast Substantial Completion October 2025 October 2025 Budget $169.7 M $169.7 M
The Accessibility Stations Improvement – Package 1 Design-Build contract to provides accessibility and various improvements at nine LIRR stations

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Jamaica Capacity Improvement Phase 2 - Hall Interlocking Expansion
tool_args.raw_text: Jamaica Capacity Improvements Phase 2, Hall Interlocking Expansion

payload.project_name: Jamaica Capacity Improvement Phase 2 - Hall Interlocking Expansion
payload.description: Part of JCI Phase 2 program of projects. Extends existing E-Yard tracks eastward providing parallel routes out of Hall interlocking. Includes new bridge over 150th Street, retaining wall modifications, Guy Brewer Blvd bridge modifications, track and 3rd rail modifications and SOGR.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Jamaica Capacity Improvements Phase 2, Hall Interlocking Expansion
A construction contract for Hall Interlocking Expansion was awarded in December 2022 to MLJT in the amount of $91.6M with overall substantial completion forecast as October 2026
Hall Interlocking Expansion project represents the first of JCI Phase 2 program elements for construction

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Harmon Shop Replacement Phase V Stage 2

payload.project_name: Harmon Shop Replacement Phase V Stage 2
payload.description: Final phase of 20-year multi-phase Harmon Shop upgrade at Croton-on-Hudson. Demolition and reconstruction of 250,000 square foot Main Shop and storeroom, replacement of heavy equipment including truck hoists, railcar hoists, overhead cranes, and lifts. Construction of Running Repair and Support Shop (RRSS) and second floor connector bridge to EMU Annex.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Harmon Shop Phase 5 Stage 2 This Design-Build project will replace MNR's 100+ year old maintenance facility in Croton-on-Hudson

Phase V, Stage 2 consists of the demolition of Building 6 maintenance facility, construction of a state-of-the-art Running Repair and Support Shop (RRSS) and second floor connector bridge between RRSS and Electrical Multi Units (EMU) Annex
Original Forecast Substantial Completion April 2023 December 2023 Budget $435.9 M $442 M

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Replacement of 130-year-old railroad viaduct from 115th Street to 123rd Street along Park Avenue in Harlem. Includes demolition of existing structure, foundations, substructure, superstructure, drainage, track and systems (including direct fixation fastener system), communication and signals, traction power, and utility relocations.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Phase 1 The Park Avenue Viaduct (PAV) replacement project will replace the 130-year-old railroad viaduct from 115th Street to 123rd Street (phase 1), along Park Avenue in Harlem
A design-builder has been retained to replace the existing Metro North Railroad – Park Avenue Viaduct (MNR-PAV) Replacement Phase I
C&D Project Budget is $590M. C&D Project EAC is $494M.
